name: racing-platform-mock-server
description: Local mock server for the Racing Platform frontend. REST is served by Stoplight Prism directly from openapi.yaml. WebSocket channels are served by a minimal Socket.IO server.

scripts.sync:contracts:fe: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const srcRoot=process.cwd();const feRoot=path.resolve(srcRoot,'..','ISUZU-RACING-FE');const pairs=[['openapi.yaml','openapi.yaml'],['asyncapi.yaml','asyncapi.yaml']];for(const [srcName,dstName] of pairs){const src=path.join(srcRoot,srcName);const dst=path.join(feRoot,dstName);if(!fs.existsSync(dst)){throw new Error('Target file not found: '+dst);}fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('synced',srcName,'->',dst);}console.log('contract sync complete');"
scripts.start: concurrently --names REST,WS --prefix-colors cyan,yellow "npm run rest" "tsx src/index.ts"
scripts.start:prod: concurrently --names REST,WS --prefix-colors cyan,yellow "npm run rest" "npm run ws:prod"
